content: Hi all, I’m new to Kernel development (meaning I have zero experience) and same for development of a file system. However, I have an idea for a new file system that has Cybersecurity features built-in. The main Cybersecurity feature that I’m designing in is ransomware detection, process quarantining, and affected file rollbacks. It’s designed to be a Copy-on-Write system to help with the versioning to do the file rollbacks. I want it to me multi-threaded as well for efficiency. Check out the GitHub repo README: https://github.com/bhh32/cyber-fs for the main design features. I just need help getting started figuring out how to do the Kernel integrations.
